column3: Are you willing to allow your child to participate in this evaluation, knowing that your child's identity will remain confidential and the data will be used solely for academic purposes?
column5: 1. Fails to give attention to details or makes careless mistakes in schoolwork
column6: 2. Has difficulty sustaining attention to tasks or activities
column7: 3. Does not seem to listen when spoken to directly
column8: 4. Does not follow through on instruction and fails to finish schoolwork
column9: 5. Has difficulty organising tasks or activities
column10: 6. Avoids dislikes or it reluctant to engage in tasks that require sustaining mental effort
column11: 7. Loses things necessary for tasks or activities (like school assignments, pencils or books)
column12: 8. Is easily distracted by extraneous stimuli
column14: 10. Fidgets with hands or feet or squirms in seat
column15: 11. Leaves seat in classroom or in other situations in which remaining seated is expected
column16: 12. Runs about or climbs excessively in situations in which remainin seat is expected
column17: 13. Has difficulty playing on engaging in leisure activities quietly
column18: 14. Is "on the go" or often as if "driven by a motor"
column20: 16. Blurts out answers before questions have been completed
column24: 20. Actively defies or refuse to comply with adults request or rules
column29: 25. Lies to obtain goods for favors or to avoid obligations
column31: 27. Has stolen items of nontrivial value
column35: 31. Is afraid to try new things for fear of making mistakes
column37: 33. Blames self for problems, feels guilty
column38: 34. Feels lonely, unwanted, or unloved, complains that "no one loves" him or her
column41: 37. Has broken someone's car or property
column42: 38. Has run away from home overnight
column43: 39. Has stayed out at night without permission
column44: 40. Has delibrately set fires to cause damage
